Video.summary: Consider why Pompeii offers more than just a story of cataclysm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Reflections on and of Pompeii

Video.summary: Examine the geological forces that forged the Bay of Naples.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Video.summary: Meet the earliest civilizations of the Tigris-Euphrates, Nile, and Indus River valleys.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: Cradles of Civilization

Video.summary: Here, explore the economic, social, and religious life of the Sumerians.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Origins of Great Ancient Civilizations
Video.title: First Cities of Sumer

Video.summary: Examine the historical origins of the Greeks and Romans, which is still an open question among scholars.
Video.grandparentTitle: Greece and Rome: An Integrated History of the Ancient Mediterranean
Video.title: Who Were the Greeks? Who Were the Romans?

Image.alt: Who Were the Greeks? Who Were the Romans?
Who Were the Greeks? Who Were the Romans?
Who Were the Greeks? Who Were the Romans?

Video.summary: Trade and travel were widespread throughout the Mediterranean basin from early times onward.
Video.grandparentTitle: Greece and Rome: An Integrated History of the Ancient Mediterranean
Video.title: Trade and Travel in the Mediterranean

Image.alt: Trade and Travel in the Mediterranean
Trade and Travel in the Mediterranean
Trade and Travel in the Mediterranean

Video.summary: By conquering Greece, Philip II of Macedon set the stage for the rise of his son, Alexander the Great.
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: Greeks and Macedonians

Video.summary: Alexander's path was prepared by Philip, but few could predict how the son would eclipse the father.
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: Alexander the Divine?

Video.summary: Look at "Operation Torch" as a study in using the military as an instrument of policy.
Video.grandparentTitle: Masters of War: History's Greatest Strategic Thinkers
Video.title: Why Strategy Matters

Video.summary: Take a systematic look at what makes Thucydides perhaps history's first great strategist.
Video.grandparentTitle: Masters of War: History's Greatest Strategic Thinkers
Video.title: Thucydides on Strategy

Video.summary: Explore the transformation of war using America's war in Afghanistan as an example.
Video.grandparentTitle: War in the Modern World
Video.title: Afghanistan and the Nature of Modern War

Image.alt: Afghanistan and the Nature of Modern War
Afghanistan and the Nature of Modern War
Afghanistan and the Nature of Modern War

Video.summary: Explore what future conflicts could look like between the United States and its adversaries.
Video.grandparentTitle: War in the Modern World
Video.title: Nightmare Scenarios of Modern War

Video.summary: Kick off the course by getting to know Cimon, a Greek politician and military general, who helped transform Athens into a world power.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace

Image.alt: Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace
Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace
Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace

Video.summary: Survey the tremendous military, economic, and material successes that transformed Samos from a sleepy island to a major regional power under his leadership.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World

Image.alt: Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant
Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant

Video.summary: Learn how Egypt, under King Narmer, become history\'s first nation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The History of Ancient Egypt

Video.summary: As Egypt becomes a great nation led by a single ruler, traditions arise that will last for millennia.
